task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

content.text: I found the Sprint 14 files. I’ll examine the assignments and testing log to assess deadline risks.

content.content:
Sprint 14 Task Assignments (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18)

Task ID  | Description                               | Assignee          | Points | Due Date   | Status
---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress
HEL-243  | Data ingestion: date format normalization | Amir Hassan       | 5      | 2026-07-15 | Blocked
HEL-244  | Integration test suite: auth flows        | Kenji Watanabe    | 3      | 2026-07-14 | Done
HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.text: I’ve analyzed the task board and test results — several items are at risk of slipping. I’ll draft the assessment now.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Analysis Date: Based on assignments + testing log as of 2026-07-11

Overall Status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 NOT RUN. 1 task Done, 2 At Risk/Blocked, 4 In Progress, 1 Not Started.

=== HIGH RISK - Likely to miss deadline without intervention ===

1. HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization (Assignee: Amir Hassan, Due: 2026-07-15, Status: Blocked)
   - Reason: Blocked by open defect HEL-D-014: Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input.
   - Impact: Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
   - Dependency: Blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15 - same day as task due date, leaving no buffer to implement/fix/test.
   - Testing evidence: TC-505 FAIL in helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt

2. HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning (Assignee: Nadia Petrov, Due: 2026-07-16, Status: At Risk)
   - Reason: Explicitly marked "At Risk" in task assignments. 8 story points (largest alongside HEL-242).
   - Impact: If UAT env is not provisioned, integration testing (HEL-245) and performance benchmark (HEL-247) cannot be completed in UAT.

3. HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline (Assignee: Kenji Watanabe, Due: 2026-07-18, Status: In Progress)
   - Reason: Test suite shows 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL. Both failures are HIGH severity and open:
     * HEL-D-014 (TC-505) - date normalization
     * HEL-D-015 (TC-507) - Large file ingestion (>200k) causes memory overflow/crash at ~210k records. Owner: Amir Hassan, root cause under investigation.
   - This task cannot close until HEL-243 / HEL-D-014 and HEL-D-015 are resolved. Due date is final day of sprint.

=== MEDIUM-HIGH RISK ===

4. HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module (Assignee: Tomas Rivera, Due: 2026-07-16, Status: In Progress)
   - Reason: 8 points, complex component. Testing log shows TC-602 Chart rendering - line chart IN PROGRESS, TC-603 bar chart NOT RUN.
   - Impact: Delays HEL-247 performance benchmark which depends on charts being complete.
   - Due 2 days before sprint end, leaving limited time for bug fixes.

5. HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load (Assignee: Derek Okafor, Due: 2026-07-18, Status: Not Started)
   - Reason: Status Not Started with 4 work days left in sprint (as of 07-11 log). Depends on HEL-241 / HEL-242 completion.
   - Testing evidence: TC-604 Load time benchmark (100k records) NOT RUN.
   - Risk will become HIGH if HEL-242 slips past 07-16.

=== LOW-MEDIUM RISK / ON TRACK ===

6. HEL-241 - Dashboard: data table component (Assignee: Fatima Al-Rashid, Due: 2026-07-14, Status: In Progress)
   - Testing evidence: TC-601 Data table rendering (10k records) PASS.
   - Assessment: Appears functionally complete per QA PASS, but status still In Progress and due date is imminent (07-14). Likely can close on time if remaining polish/docs done. Low risk unless review finds issues.

7. HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination (Assignee: Raj Patel, Due: 2026-07-14, Status: In Progress)
   - No testing dependency. Administrative task, 2 points. Risk is external vendor response, not technical. Low-Medium risk.

8. HEL-244 - Integration test suite: auth flows (Assignee: Kenji Watanabe, Due: 2026-07-14, Status: Done)
   - Testing evidence: 4/4 PASS (TC-401 to TC-404). No risk.

=== Recommendations ===

- Prioritize unblocking HEL-243: Escalate Meridian sample data request (due 2026-07-15) - request early delivery. Assign second dev to assist Amir Hassan on HEL-D-015 memory overflow.
- HEL-246: Check with Nadia Petrov/Infra on provisioning blocker - consider workaround or partial UAT env to allow HEL-245/HEL-247 to start.
- HEL-242: Ensure Tomas Rivera has support; split TC-602/TC-603 testing to run in parallel as components land.
- HEL-247: Begin test harness preparation now even though Status is Not Started, to reduce time once HEL-242 lands.

Conclusion: 3 tasks at HIGH risk of missing 2026-07-18 sprint deadline (HEL-243, HEL-246, HEL-245), 2 at MEDIUM-HIGH (HEL-242, HEL-247).

content.text:
Assessment complete and written to **sprint14_deadline_risk.txt**.

**Summary of at-risk tasks:**

**HIGH RISK:**
- **HEL-243** (Date normalization) - Status **Blocked** by HEL-D-014 which fails on MM/DD/YYYY (~40% of Meridian data). Blocked on external sample data due 07-15 - same day as task due.
- **HEL-246** (UAT server provisioning) - Status explicitly **At Risk**, 8 points, due 07-16. Blocks downstream testing.
- **HEL-245** (Integration test: data pipeline) - **In Progress** but 2/7 tests FAIL (TC-505 date norm + TC-507 large file memory overflow/crash at 210k). Both HIGH severity, owned by Amir. Due final day 07-18.

**MEDIUM-HIGH RISK:**
- **HEL-242** (Chart rendering) - 8 points, In Progress, TC-602 IN PROGRESS / TC-603 NOT RUN. Due 07-16, blocks perf benchmark.
- **HEL-247** (Performance benchmark) - **Not Started**, due 07-18, depends on HEL-241/242. TC-604 NOT RUN.

**ON TRACK:** HEL-241 (table PASS), HEL-244 (Done, 4/4 auth PASS), HEL-248 (low complexity).

Full details, impact, and recommendations are in the file.
